records.display_name: Decrease of unbillable tolls from enforcement

payload.claim_text: President Sheridan thanked all task force members and their dedicated employees for continuing this work, which is making a difference as shown by a decrease of unbillable tolls.
payload.subject: unbillable tolls

records.raw_text: which is making a difference as shown by a decrease of unbillable tolls

records.display_name: Scope of ITS consultant design services

payload.claim_text: The consultants will support TBTA with design services including the integration and maintenance of the systems to promote safe and efficient operations. This includes field ITS components such as sensors, signs, cameras, and communication links, as well as updates to control systems, cybersecurity needs, and other system integrations. The contracts also provide early-stage engineering and assessments to help plan future capital projects and ensure they align with TBTA's operational and technological needs.

records.raw_text: The consultants will support TBTA with design services including the integration and maintenance of the systems to promote safe and efficient operations. This includes field ITS components such as sensors, signs, cameras, and communication links, as well as updates to control systems, cybersecurity needs, and other system integrations. The contracts also provide early-stage engineering and assessments to help plan future capital projects and ensure they align with TBTA's operational and technological needs.

records.display_name: TBTA Targeted Joint-Agency Enforcement Operations Against Ghost Plates

payload.description: Multi-agency initiative targeting ghost plates, toll evasion, and enforcement. Task force has 20 regional law enforcement agencies. TBTA kicked off the initiative with the Governor, Mayor, and Chair Lieber on March 12, 2024.
payload.project_name: TBTA Targeted Joint-Agency Enforcement Operations Against Ghost Plates

records.raw_text: TBTA passed the two-year mark of its targeted joint-agency enforcement operations against ghost plates, conducting its 125th joint-operation last week at the RFK Bridge.
